mapper.select: select id, title, link, create_time as createTime from osh_announcement where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 and resource_type = 'info_gap' and channel = #{channel} order by create_time desc limit 5
mapper.insert: insert into osh_announcement ( title, link, resource_type, channel, status, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{title}, #{link}, 'info_gap', #{channel}, 0, 0, #{operator}, now(), #{operator}, now() )
